title: 4 Consumer Staples Stocks To Watch In The Stock Market Now
text: Do these consumer staples stocks deserve a spot on your watchlist today?

title: 8 Upcoming Dividend Increases Including A Dividend King
text: All stocks have at least five fiscal years of dividend growth history and come from the U.S. Dividend Champions List. They have an average increase of 9.3% and a median increase of 10.0%.

title: Mondelēz International's SnackFutures Opens Applications for CoLab 2023 Start-Up Engagement Program
text: CHICAGO, Sept. 20, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- SnackFutures, the Mondelēz International, Inc. (Nasdaq: MDLZ) innovation and venture hub, today opened applications for CoLab 2023. This is the third year of the start-up engagement program which was created to bring ‘big and small' together to drive mutual growth.

title: Mondelez (MDLZ) Faces Cost Woes, Banks on Efficient Pricing
text: Mondelez (MDLZ) has been battling cost inflation for a while. Efficient pricing efforts and contributions from buyouts have been upsides.

title: TRIDENT TEAMS UP WITH CHLÖE BAILEY TO LAUNCH #CHEWTHEVIBES CHALLENGE AND NEW GUM INNOVATION
text: Award-winning musical artist drops new song featuring gum-chewing sounds in celebration of the TikTok challenge and new TRIDENT VIBES ft. SOUR PATCH KIDS gum EAST HANOVER, N.J.

title: Mondelez International: Buy The Snack Giant
text: Mondelez is the global market leader in biscuits and No. 2 in chocolate. The company is growing organically and by bolt-on acquisitions. The company is cutting costs and improving margins.

title: 7 Best Food Stocks to Buy Now
text: Food stocks are interesting with food price increases continuing to outpace general inflation. That makes these seven buys.
